help.searchEngineModel: This model helps the AI find relevant lore for your current scene. Changing models requires reprocessing all lore files, which takes a few minutes.
help.contextWindow: The maximum amount of text the AI can reference per generation. Larger values mean more context and lore. Most models support 128k (~100k words). Usually no need to change.
help.apiBase: The endpoint URL from your AI provider, e.g. https://api.deepseek.com for DeepSeek.
help.apiKey: Get this from your AI provider's website. It's like a password that verifies your identity.
help.localModelPath: Enter the directory where your local model files are stored.
help.ollamaModel: Enter the name of a model you've already pulled in Ollama, e.g. llama3.

llmMode.api: Online API: Easiest — just enter your key
llmMode.local: Local Model: Offline, requires downloading model files
llmMode.ollama: Ollama: Connect directly if you already use Ollama

help.chapterLength: Controls the target word count for each generation.
help.pinnedContext: Writing Rules are constraints the AI must never violate — like character relationships, secrets, or personality limits.
help.coreAlwaysInclude: These characters will always be referenced during generation.
help.currentChapterFocus: Set a plot point as this chapter's focus and the AI will prioritize advancing it.

importFlow.title: Import Existing Work

writer.emptyContent: Enter an instruction, or just hit Continue to start writing.

writer.editSaveSuccess: Chapter updated. Please resolve dirty chapter notes.
writer.saveGlobalSuccess: These parameters have been saved to global settings.
writer.saveAuSuccess: These parameters have been saved to this story's settings.

settingsMode.placeholder: Describe the lore changes you want… (due to model limitations, create one file per message for best results)
settingsMode.fandomPlaceholder: Paste your character analysis, or describe characters and worldbuilding to add… (due to model limitations, create one file per message for best results)
settingsMode.firstTimeTooltip: Here you can describe lore changes in natural language. The AI will help create and modify characters, worldbuilding, plot points, and more. All changes need your confirmation before taking effect.
settingsMode.undoNotSupported: Modifications can't be auto-undone. Please edit manually to revert.
settingsMode.largeTextDetected: Large text detected. How should it be handled?
settingsMode.actionInProgress: An action is in progress. Please wait.
settingsMode.emptyAssistant: I'll organize your lore changes into confirmable actions.
settingsMode.emptyDescription: Describe the character profiles, worldbuilding, plot points, or writing rules you want to change. The AI will prepare a list of changes for your review.
settingsMode.fandomEmptyDescription: Paste character analyses or worldbuilding notes. The AI will organize them into canon lore files.
settingsMode.parseError: This tool call's parameters couldn't be parsed. You can skip it, or wait for the model to return a complete response.
settingsMode.sideDescription: This uses your story's model config but won't touch chapter drafts. Confirmed changes update lore files and plot points immediately.
settingsMode.toolActionBusy: An action is in progress. Please wait.
settingsMode.busyWriteBlocked: Lore edits in progress. Please wait before switching back to Write.

prompt.largeTextCharacter: The following is a large block of user text. Please organize it into a character profile, preserving as much original content as possible.
prompt.largeTextWorldbuilding: The following is a large block of user text. Please organize it into a worldbuilding file, preserving as much original content as possible.

global.description: These are the default settings. All new stories will start with this configuration.
global.searchEngineDescription: Finds the most relevant lore for your current scene.
global.builtinEmbedding: Using built-in bge-small-zh model. No configuration needed.

story.inheritDescription: Using global settings by default. Toggle the override below to use a different model or key for this story.

story.chapterLengthDescription: Controls the target word count for each generation.

story.pinnedDescription: Writing rules are always prioritized during generation. Keep only the most critical ones.

emptyPinned.title: No Writing Rules Yet

"They haven't gotten together yet"
"Character A doesn't know Character B's secret"

facts.title: Plot Points
facts.statusHintResolved: Once marked Resolved, this point won't be prioritized in future generations.
facts.weightHint: Higher importance means the AI is more likely to reference this point.
facts.cleanHint: This is the text the AI actually references. Keep it concise and clear.
facts.rawHint: Your personal excerpt for reference. Doesn't need to be polished.
facts.charactersHint: Separate character names with commas for easy filtering.
facts.emptySelectionTitle: Select a plot point from the left to view and edit
facts.emptySelectionDescription: Plot points help the AI remember key events, foreshadowing, and relationships. The clearer they are, the more consistent the story stays.
facts.noSearchResultDescription: Try different keywords, or add your first point.

statusHint.unresolved: Foreshadowing or unresolved thread. Can be set as chapter focus. Injected into AI context.
statusHint.active: Established fact. Always injected into AI context.
statusHint.resolved: Resolved thread. No longer injected into AI context.
statusHint.deprecated: Retired point. No longer injected into AI context.

facts.staleHint: {{count}} point(s) haven't been referenced in 30+ chapters and may be outdated
facts.batchDeprecatedDesc: Deprecated points won't be referenced by the AI. You can find them under the Deprecated tab.
facts.batchResolvedDesc: Resolved points won't be actively pushed by the AI.
facts.batchActiveDesc: Active points will be referenced during generation.
facts.batchUnresolvedDesc: Unresolved points will be prioritized by the AI.
facts.extractRangeDesc: Choose which chapters to extract plot points from. More chapters = longer wait (~10-30 sec each).
facts.extractNoChapter: No finalized chapters yet. Nothing to extract.
facts.extractNoResult: No new plot points extracted from this chapter.
facts.extractReviewDescription: Review what the AI extracted before saving to your plot points.

coreIncludes.tooMany: You have {{count}} pinned characters. We recommend no more than 3 — too many takes up AI memory.
coreIncludes.hint: Pinned characters' profiles are fully injected every generation, ensuring they stay in character. Recommended: 1-3 main characters only.
coreIncludes.missingCoreLimit: Consider adding a Core Constraints section
coreIncludes.missingCoreLimitDesc: Add a "## Core Constraints" section to this character's profile with 2-3 key personality rules. When AI memory is tight, at least these lines will be preserved.

sidecar.restartHint: Please restart the app, or check the log files.

focus.lastFocusExpired: Last chapter's focus has expired. Please re-select.

undo.confirmDesc:
This will:
· Delete the chapter text
· Remove plot points extracted from it
· Clear drafts for this and later chapters

advanced.advancedHint: These actions are only needed when files were modified externally or state is inconsistent.

welcome.title: FicForge
welcome.subtitle: AI-powered fanfic writing. Every detail remembered. No more OOC.

apiConfig.title: Connect Your AI Model
apiConfig.apiBaseHint: The endpoint URL from your AI provider
apiConfig.apiKeyHint: Get this from your AI provider's website
apiConfig.localPathHint: Enter the folder path where your model files are stored
apiConfig.requireTest: Please test the connection before continuing

createFandom.title: What fandom are you writing for?
createFandom.namePlaceholder: e.g. Genshin Impact, Jujutsu Kaisen, Detroit: Become Human…
createFandom.whyFandom: Why do I need a Fandom?
createFandom.fandomExplain:
FicForge organizes your work in two layers: Fandom and AU.

Fandom = The source material (e.g. Detroit, Genshin)
Store canon character analyses and world rules here.

AU = Your specific story's setting (e.g. Space Royalty AU, Coffee Shop AU)
Store this story's character profiles, worldbuilding, and plot points here.

One Fandom can have multiple AUs, sharing canon lore but keeping stories separate.

Don't want layers? Just skip — you can set this up later.

completion.title: All Set!
completion.nextCreateAu: Create an AU to start writing
completion.nextAddCharacters: Add character analyses to Canon Lore
completion.nextImport: Import an existing novel to continue

language.title: Pick Your Interface Language
language.subtitle: Set the UI language first so the rest of the mobile setup updates immediately.
language.zhDescription: Use the full onboarding flow in Chinese.
language.enDescription: Use the full onboarding flow in English.

llm.title: Connect Your Writing Model
llm.subtitle: Mobile onboarding uses the hosted API path first. Test the connection before moving on.
llm.deepseekDescription: Prefills the official DeepSeek endpoint for Chinese-first writing.
llm.openaiDescription: Prefills the official OpenAI endpoint. Enter your model name directly.
llm.customDescription: Any OpenAI-compatible provider can be entered manually.

embedding.title: Configure Retrieval
embedding.subtitle: Embedding powers lore retrieval and RAG. You can wire it up now or skip it for later.
embedding.recommendedDescription: Recommended for stronger Chinese retrieval quality with providers like SiliconFlow.
embedding.recommendedHint: If you skip this for now, lore retrieval and RAG stay unavailable until you configure embedding later.
embedding.skipDescription: Enter the app first and configure embedding later in Settings.

setup.title: Create or Import
setup.subtitle: Choose whether to start with a new fandom, open the import flow, or review settings next.
setup.createTitle: Create a New Fandom and AU
setup.createDescription: Create both the fandom and its first AU now, then start writing right away.
setup.importDescription: Finish onboarding, then jump straight into the import flow for existing work.
setup.syncDescription: Finish onboarding, then continue with WebDAV or sync-related setup from Settings.
setup.laterDescription: Skip creation and import for now and explore the app first.
setup.fandomPlaceholder: e.g. Genshin Impact, Jujutsu Kaisen, Detroit: Become Human...
setup.auPlaceholder: e.g. Modern Campus, Cyber Detectives, Space Royalty...

ethics.subtitle: Mobile uses the same local-first and responsible-use guidance as desktop.
ethics.confirm: I will only import or create content I have the right to use, and I understand I should follow platform disclosure rules when publishing.

complete.title: Ready to Go
complete.subtitle: These settings will be saved together when you finish.
complete.embeddingSkipped: Embedding model: skipped for now, can be configured later in Settings
complete.createSummary: Initial content: create fandom "{{fandomName}}" and AU "{{auName}}"
complete.importSummary: Initial content: open the local import flow after setup
complete.syncSummary: Initial content: open Settings after setup to continue sync configuration
complete.laterSummary: Initial content: enter the library first and create or import later

ethics.aboutFooter: FicForge runs locally on your computer. Your data is never uploaded or used for AI training. Please only import your own work, and consider disclosing AI assistance when publishing.
ethics.importWarning: Please ensure you have the right to use the content you import. Do not import others' work.
ethics.exportAiLabel: Append AI assistance disclosure to exported file
ethics.exportDisclaimer: This work was created with AI assistance (tool: FicForge).
ethics.exportUncheckedWarning: With this unchecked, please ensure you follow the AI disclosure policies of your publishing platform.
ethics.onboardingBody:
FicForge helps you write your own stories. All data stays on your device and is never uploaded.

Reminders:
· Only import content you own
· When publishing AI-assisted work, consider disclosing AI involvement
· Follow the rules of your creative community
ethics.onboardingConsent: By using this tool, you acknowledge that you have read and understood our Responsible Use statement
